MINI MINUTES: August 29,2002
Judge Pro Tem: Karl Olson
Room 501A

Case called for settlement conference-All parties present Stipulated judgment for plaintiff.
Possession of premises located at 520 South Van Ness Ave. #149, San Francisco, California.Total money judgment of $2,046.15 to be waived if defendantvacates premises by 5:00 pm on Sept.15,2002. Writ of possession immediately stayed to Sept.15,2002 at 5:00 pm.Each side to bear own costs.Plaintiff to prepare order.
